<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.sequencer.admin.v30.SequencerSnapshot">

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.sequencer.admin.v30.SequencerSnapshot.MemberPreviousTimestamp">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-sequencer-admin-v30-sequencersnapshot-memberprevioustimestamp">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">member</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">previous_timestamp</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">int64</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The value below must be: - None if member doesn&#x27;t have any events in its event stream &lt;= SequencerSnapshot.latest_timestamp - Set to the timestamp of the last event in the member&#x27;s event stream &lt;= SequencerSnapshot.latest_timestamp in microseconds of UTC time since Unix epoch</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.protocol.v30.AggregationRule">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-protocol-v30-aggregationrule">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">eligible_members</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Members who are allowed to send a request for the underlying aggregation. Must contain SubmissionRequest.sender, otherwise the request is rejected. Must have at least threshold many elements.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">threshold</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">int32</span>
      
    </div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.crypto.v30.Signature">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-crypto-v30-signature">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">format</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SignatureFormat</span>
      
    </div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">signature</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">bytes</span>
      
    </div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">signed_by</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The fingerprint/id of the keypair used to create this signature and needed to verify. If a signature delegation is defined, this fingerprint/id is not used to produce the signature, and, instead is used to sign the delegation.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">signing_algorithm_spec</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SigningAlgorithmSpec</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The signing algorithm specification used to produce this signature</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">signature_delegation</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SignatureDelegation</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">An optional signature delegation where a long-term signing key authorizes a session signing key to sign on its behalf.</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.crypto.v30.SignatureFormat">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-crypto-v30-signatureformat">
  
  
  
  <ul class="x2mdx-ref-enum-list">
    
    <li><code>SIGNATURE_FORMAT_UNSPECIFIED</code></li>
    
    <li><code>SIGNATURE_FORMAT_RAW</code></li>
    
    <li><code>SIGNATURE_FORMAT_DER</code></li>
    
    <li><code>SIGNATURE_FORMAT_CONCAT</code></li>
    
    <li><code>SIGNATURE_FORMAT_SYMBOLIC</code></li>
    
  </ul>
  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.crypto.v30.SigningAlgorithmSpec">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-crypto-v30-signingalgorithmspec">
  
  
  
  <ul class="x2mdx-ref-enum-list">
    
    <li><code>SIGNING_ALGORITHM_SPEC_UNSPECIFIED</code></li>
    
    <li><code>SIGNING_ALGORITHM_SPEC_ED25519</code></li>
    
    <li><code>SIGNING_ALGORITHM_SPEC_EC_DSA_SHA_256</code></li>
    
    <li><code>SIGNING_ALGORITHM_SPEC_EC_DSA_SHA_384</code></li>
    
  </ul>
  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.crypto.v30.SignatureDelegation">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-crypto-v30-signaturedelegation">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">session_key</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">bytes</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">ASN.1 + DER-encoding of X.509 SubjectPublicKeyInfo structure of the session public key: https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc5280#section-4.1. This key was used to produce the actual signature.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">session_key_spec</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SigningKeySpec</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The signing key spec for the session key.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">validity_period_from_inclusive</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">int64</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">A timestamp in microseconds of UTC time since Unix epoch that indicates when the session key is considered valid.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">validity_period_duration_seconds</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">uint32</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Duration in seconds indicating how long the session key remains valid. The validity period starts from `validity_period_from_inclusive` above.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">format</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SignatureFormat</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The format of the signature</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">signature</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">bytes</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The signature of the combined hash of the session key fingerprint, validity period, and synchronizer id, by the long-term key. This signature authorizes the session key to act on behalf of the long-term key.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">signing_algorithm_spec</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SigningAlgorithmSpec</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The signing algorithm specification used to produce this signature</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.crypto.v30.SigningKeySpec">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-crypto-v30-signingkeyspec">
  
  
  
  <ul class="x2mdx-ref-enum-list">
    
    <li><code>SIGNING_KEY_SPEC_UNSPECIFIED</code></li>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.sequencer.admin.v30.SequencerPruningStatus">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-sequencer-admin-v30-sequencerpruningstatus">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">now</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">int64</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">current time according to the sequencer in microseconds of UTC time since Unix epoch</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">earliest_event_timestamp</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">int64</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">the earliest event we are currently storing in microseconds of UTC time since Unix epoch</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">members</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated SequencerMemberStatus</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">details of each member registered on the sequencer</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.sequencer.admin.v30.SequencerMemberStatus">

  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">

    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">in microseconds of UTC time since Unix epoch</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">enabled</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">bool</span>
      
    </div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.protocol.v30.TrafficPurchased">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-protocol-v30-trafficpurchased">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">member</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Member receiving the traffic</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">serial</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">uint32</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Serial of the update</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">extra_traffic_purchased</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">uint64</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">New total extra traffic purchased</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">sequencing_timestamp</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">int64</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Timestamp at which this state is valid</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.protocol.v30.TrafficConsumed">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-protocol-v30-trafficconsumed">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">member</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Member consuming the traffic</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">extra_traffic_consumed</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">uint64</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Total extra traffic consumed</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">base_traffic_remainder</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">uint64</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Remaining free base traffic</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">last_consumed_cost</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">uint64</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Cost deducted at `timestamp`, only present when traffic was consumed at `timestamp`, otherwise is set to 0</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">sequencing_timestamp</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">int64</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Timestamp at which this state is valid - this timestamp is used to compute the base traffic remainder above</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.sequencer.admin.v30.SnapshotResponse.Failure">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-sequencer-admin-v30-snapshotresponse-failure">

</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.sequencer.admin.v30.SnapshotResponse.VersionedSuccess">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-sequencer-admin-v30-snapshotresponse-versionedsuccess">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">snapshot</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">bytes</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Contains a versioned SequencerSnapshot of version v1 or higher</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

</AccordionGroup>


</div>

<div className="x2mdx-ref-right-rail" role="complementary" aria-label="Examples and responses">
  
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-panel">
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-code">
<div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-head">
  <span className="x2mdx-ref-rail-heading">grpcurl</span>
  
</div>

```bash grpcurl
# Add -plaintext if the server is not using TLS.
grpcurl \
  -d @ \
  <HOST:PORT> \
  com.digitalasset.canton.sequencer.admin.v30.SequencerAdministrationService/Snapshot <<'EOF'
{
  "timestamp": "string"
}
EOF
```

</div>
  </div>
  
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-panel">
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-code x2mdx-ref-rail-code--response">
<div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-head">
  <span className="x2mdx-ref-rail-heading">OK</span>
  
  <span className="x2mdx-ref-response-label">application/json</span>
  
</div>

```json OK
{
  "success": {
    "state": {
      "latestTimestamp": "0",
      "lastBlockHeight": "0",
      "status": {
        "now": "0",
        "earliestEventTimestamp": "0",
        "members": [
          {}
        ]
      },
      "additional": {
        "implementationName": "string",
        "info": "BASE64_ENCODED_BYTES"
      },
      "inFlightAggregations": [
        {
          "aggregationId": "BASE64_ENCODED_BYTES",
          "aggregationRule": {},
          "maxSequencingTime": "0",
          "aggregatedSenders": [
            {}
          ]
        }
      ],
      "trafficPurchased": [
        {
          "member": "string",
          "serial": 0,
          "extraTrafficPurchased": "0",
          "sequencingTimestamp": "0"
        }
      ],
      "trafficConsumed": [
        {
          "member": "string",
          "extraTrafficConsumed": "0",
          "baseTrafficRemainder": "0",
          "lastConsumedCost": "0",
          "sequencingTimestamp": "0"
        }
      ],
      "memberPreviousTimestamps": [
        {
          "member": "string",
          "previousTimestamp": "0"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

</div>
  </div>
  
</div>

</div>
